items.title: Jeremiyah Love's record guarantee is a product of his draft slot, not his position
items.summary: When Cardinals rookie running back Jeremiyah Love recently put pen to paper on his rookie contract, he secured the biggest full guarantee of any running back in NFL history.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Kent battle back towards parity at Gloucestershire
items.summary: Tawanda Muyeye, Chris Benjamin and Ben Dawkins post half-centuries as Kent rally on day two of their Division Two clash at Bristol.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Perry & Buble among performers at three World Cup opening ceremonies
items.summary: Katy Perry, Michael Buble and Alanis Morissette are among the artists who will perform at three World Cup opening ceremonies this summer.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
